title: Selaginella shakotanensis
taxonomy: Selaginella shakotanensis is classified under the kingdom Plantae, division Lycopodiophyta, class Lycopodiopsida, order Selaginellales, and family Selaginellaceae. This plant belongs to a genus of approximately 700 species, all of which are vascular cryptogams. The Selaginella genus is further divided into several subgenera, and S. shakotanensis is specifically classified as a species within one of these subgenera. The classification of S. shakotanensis is based on its unique morphology and anatomical features, which distinguish it from other species in the genus. The plant's classification has been the subject of ongoing research and study in the field of botany.
